title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model designed for coding agents, long-context workflows, and multimodality with support for up to 1-million-token context windows. It provides API endpoints compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI standards and integrates with coding tools like Cursor and Cline. MiniMax Code adds agent team collaboration features for implementation and verification tasks.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model built for coding agents, long-context work, and multimodality, with context windows up to 1 million tokens. It positions M3 as an alternative to Claude and Codex, exposing API endpoints compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI standards and integrating with coding tools including Cursor and Cline. It also covers MiniMax Code, which adds agent team collaboration features that split implementation and verification tasks.
